KOHINOOR HILLS.title: Kohinoor Hills
KOHINOOR HILLS.shortTagline: Premium VMRDA-Approved Gated Plots in Kothavalasa
KOHINOOR HILLS.description: Kohinoor Hills is a premium residential gated plotted community developed by BBG India in Kothavalasa, Visakhapatnam. The project offers legal, VMRDA-approved open plots with quality infrastructure, blacktop roads, underground utilities, greenery and parks. It combines peaceful living with smart investment potential in a rapidly growing location.

whyInvest: Kohinoor Hills is located in Kothavalasa, Vizianagaram District, close to the Howrah–Chennai railway corridor and the important Kothavalasa–Kirandul freight railway line, which transports iron ore to Visakhapatnam Port.
Located near the Kothavalasa–Araku tourism route, providing convenient access to one of the most popular hill tourism corridors in North Andhra.

Patanjali Ayurved has proposed a food and herbal processing park in Vizianagaram district, with land allocated near Chinnaraopalli village in Kothavalasa mandal, expected to generate significant employment.
The project is located near the NH-516B corridor (Pendurthi – Kothavalasa – Bowdara), which is being upgraded to improve connectivity between Visakhapatnam, Vizianagaram, and Araku regions.
NH-516B connects to NH-16 near Pendurthi and improves travel toward Araku and agency areas.
The location has access to educational institutions such as AP Model Schools (English Medium) and healthcare facilities in the surrounding region.
